home.selectDates: Select your stay dates and submit a booking request.

search.title: Availability — {property}
search.availabilityError: Availability cannot be checked right now. Please try again later.
search.noUnits: No active units for this property.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.phoneInvalid: Phone must start with + and contain digits only (e.g. +385977402538).

confirmation.subtitlePending: We are checking availability. This usually takes a few seconds.
confirmation.subtitlePendingSlow: Processing is taking longer than usual. Check your email or contact us.
confirmation.subtitleConfirmed: A confirmation has been sent to your email address.
confirmation.subtitleRefused: Unfortunately those dates are no longer available. We sent you an email.
confirmation.lookupFailed: Booking status is unavailable right now.

platform.metaDescription: FINE STAR d.o.o. develops Stay.hr (online booking) and Hospira (reception app) for accommodation providers in Croatia.
platform.tagline: Online booking and reception platform for accommodation providers
platform.intro: FINE STAR d.o.o. provides software for landlords and operators of apartments, holiday homes, and other accommodation. We enable online booking requests for guests and digital check-in, calendars, reservation management, and guest communication (including WhatsApp when enabled) for property staff.

stay.title: Stay.hr
stay.body: Booking websites, availability checks, online requests, and connection to the property's operational system.

hospira.title: Hospira
hospira.body: Reception tablet app for guest check-in, calendar views, reservation handling, and business guest communication via WhatsApp Business API (stay confirmations, arrival info, etc.).

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Business (Hospira)
whatsapp.body: Hospira is the WhatsApp Business account of FINE STAR d.o.o. We use it solely to communicate with guests of accommodation properties about bookings and stays (e.g. confirmations, arrival instructions, replies to enquiries). Data processing is described in our privacy policy. Guests may stop communicating at any time.

platform.legalNotice: By using Stay.hr and Hospira you accept our terms of service and privacy policy.

privacy.metaDescription: How Stay.hr and Hospira process personal data for guests, staff, and platform users.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how {controllerName} processes personal data through the Stay.hr platform (web booking, API, reception web) and the Hospira app (reception tablet).

whoWeAre.title: 1. Who we are

dataWeCollect.title: 2. Data we process

purposes.title: 3. Purpose and legal basis

accommodationRole.title: 4. Role of accommodation providers
accommodationRole.body:
Accommodation providers (tenants) using Stay.hr and Hospira are often independent controllers of their guests' data in connection with providing accommodation. In that context, {controllerName} acts as a tool provider or processor following the provider's instructions, within contractual and legal limits.

For questions about data collected by a specific property, you may also contact that property directly.

recipients.title: 5. Recipients and processors

cookies.title: 6. Cookies
cookies.body:
We use functional cookies only:

• language preference on booking pages;
• session cookie for reception web login (app.stay.hr).

We do not use advertising cookies or third-party profiling tools. You can delete cookies in your browser settings; some parts of the service may then not work correctly.

retention.title: 7. Retention
retention.body:
We retain reservation and check-in data for the duration of the accommodation contract and as long as needed to meet legal obligations (e.g. tourist records, accounting rules). Technical logs are kept for up to 12 months unless longer retention is required for security or dispute resolution.

After the retention period, data is deleted or anonymised.

rights.title: 8. Your rights
rights.body:
Under the GDPR you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, objection, and data portability, and to withdraw consent where processing is consent-based.

Send requests to {email}. We will respond within the statutory timeframe after verifying your identity.

complaint.title: 9. Supervisory authority
complaint.body: If you believe your data is processed unlawfully, you may lodge a complaint with the Croatian Personal Data Protection Agency (AZOP), Martićeva 14, 10000 Zagreb, www.azop.hr.

changes.title: 10. Changes to this policy
changes.body: We may update this policy from time to time. The date of the last update is shown at the top of this page. Continued use of the service after publication constitutes acceptance of the updated policy, unless the law requires additional notice or consent.

terms.metaDescription: Terms of use for the Stay.hr platform and Hospira reception app.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms govern use of services provided by {controllerName}: the Stay.hr platform (web booking, API, reception web) and the Hospira app (reception tablet). By using the services you accept these terms.
terms.contactFooter: For questions about these terms, contact {email}.

scope.title: 1. Scope and parties
scope.body:
Services are provided by {controllerName}, tax ID (OIB) {oib}, {address}.

These terms apply to guests booking accommodation via Stay.hr booking sites, to staff of accommodation properties using Hospira and reception web, and to other platform users within the scope of their assigned access.

services.title: 2. Description of services
services.body:
Stay.hr enables online booking requests and reservations, availability checks, and connection to the property's operational system. Hospira is a reception app for guest check-in, calendar views, reservation management, and guest communication (including WhatsApp integration when enabled).

Features may depend on the accommodation property (tenant) and its integration settings.

guestBooking.title: 3. Guest bookings

providers.title: 4. Accommodation providers and staff

acceptableUse.title: 5. Acceptable use

availability.title: 6. Availability and service changes
availability.body:
We aim to provide services continuously but do not guarantee uninterrupted availability. Planned maintenance, third-party integration failures (e.g. channel managers, eVisitor, WhatsApp), or force majeure may temporarily disable certain features.

Platform features may evolve; material changes to these terms will be published by updating this page.

liability.title: 7. Liability

intellectualProperty.title: 8. Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.body: Stay.hr, Hospira, logos, software, and documentation are protected by {controllerName} or its licensors. You may not copy, decompile, or distribute the platform without written consent, except as part of normal use of the service.

termination.title: 9. Term and termination
termination.body:
The agreement with platform users lasts while access to the services continues. Properties and users may stop using the services under their agreement with {controllerName}.

Guests may stop using booking sites at any time; confirmed bookings remain subject to the property's rules.

law.title: 10. Governing law and jurisdiction
law.body:
These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Croatia. Disputes fall under the jurisdiction of the competent courts in Croatia, unless mandatory consumer protection rules provide otherwise.

Personal data processing is governed by a separate privacy policy ({privacyEmail}).

changes.title: 11. Changes to these terms
changes.body: We may update these terms from time to time. The date of the last update is shown at the top of this page. Continued use of the service after publication constitutes acceptance of the updated terms, unless the law requires additional notice.
